name: Corned Beef & Cabbage with Horseradish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onion and pierce it with the cloves.
2. Place the corned beef, onion, parsley, and peppercorns in a large pot.
3. Cover with water.
4. Bring to a simmer and cook gently until tender (2-1/2 to 3 hours).
5. Cut the cabbage into wedges and core.
6. Add to the pot and simmer until tender (about 30 minutes).
7. Combine sour cream with horseradish sauce.
8. Serve the meat and cabbage with some of the broth ladled over, and serve the horseradish on the side.
